purpose: Single-file handoff for the main agent and any trusted local sub-agents working in this repo.
new_machine_install_contract: Ask the user for scaffold command name, plan command name, and delegation mode.
Install only the Codex-specific command environment under C:/codex-local and C:/dev.
Do not treat bootstrap as a whole-machine reset.
direct_only_when: cross-machine environment mutation without user approval
token_budget_rules: Prefer compact JSON metadata before large rendered artifacts.
Write shared task instructions here once, then have local agents read this file before acting.
